parameters.query:
SELECT * FROM public.fn_upsert_usuario_perfil(
  '{{ String($('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.telefono || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ (() => { const v = String($('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.nombre || '').trim(); return v ? "'" + v.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL'; })() }},
  {{ (() => { const v = String($('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.direccion || '').trim(); return v ? "'" + v.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL'; })() }},
  {{ (() => { const v = String($('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.tipo_despacho || '').trim(); return v ? "'" + v.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL'; })() }},
  {{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.restaurante_id }}
)

INSERT INTO public.escalaciones
  (restaurante_id, telefono, problema, contexto, conversation_id, account_id, contact_id, tipo_escalacion, estado)
VALUES (
  {{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.restaurante_id }},
  '{{ $input.first().json.telefono.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $input.first().json.problema_escalacion.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{"subflujo": "Perfil Cliente", "tipo": "error_sistema"}'::jsonb,
  '', '', '', 'error_sistema', 'pendiente'
)
